tasks.subject: Task 1: Build the top language group in .zshrc (add go + ruby, relocate node)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make the fork's top language section read `python -> uv -> argcomplete -> go -> node -> ruby -> 1password`, byte-identical to upstream `93b9788`: insert the go/node/ruby blocks after the argcomplete block, and remove the now-duplicate node block from its old alphabetical slot (between ncdu and opentofu).

**Files:**
- Modify: `zsh/.zshrc`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] go/node/ruby in order between `zi auto with"uv" for argcomplete` and `# 1password`, byte-identical to 93b9788
- [ ] ruby uses `if has brew; then add path "${HOMEBREW_PREFIX}/opt/ruby/bin"; fi` (no opt/ruby@* glob, no RUBYHOME)
- [ ] old node block removed (ncdu immediately followed by opentofu)
- [ ] :node-init appears exactly once
- [ ] zsh -n zsh/.zshrc passes

**Verify:** diff the argcomplete->1password span against `git show 93b9788:zsh/.zshrc`, grep -c ':node-init' == 1, old slot clear, zsh -n passes -> OK

**Steps:** 1) insert go/node/ruby group after argcomplete; 2) remove old node block (ncdu/opentofu anchors); 3) run Verify; 4) commit `feat(zsh): group go, node, ruby into top language section (IT-8323)`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "diff <(git show 93b9788:zsh/.zshrc | sed -n '/^zi auto with\"uv\" for argcomplete$/,/^zi auto has\"op\" wait1 for 1password-cli$/p') <(sed -n '/^zi auto with\"uv\" for argcomplete$/,/^zi auto has\"op\" wait1 for 1password-cli$/p' zsh/.zshrc) && [ \"$(grep -c ':node-init' zsh/.zshrc)\" = 1 ] && zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["go/node/ruby in order between argcomplete and 1password, byte-identical to 93b9788", "ruby uses has-brew opt/ruby/bin detection, no RUBYHOME/opt-ruby@* glob", "old node block removed (ncdu -> opentofu)", ":node-init appears exactly once", "zsh -n passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add brew "go" and brew "node" to the Brewfile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the two new brews this ring installs, each byte-identical to upstream's line, in the fork's own alphabetical order. No `brew "ruby"` (ruby stays opportunistic, matching upstream).

**Files:**
- Modify: `Brewfile`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] brew "go" between brew "gnupg" and brew "graphviz"
- [ ] brew "node" between brew "nmap" and brew "ocrmypdf"
- [ ] both lines byte-identical to upstream (absent from fork-only diff)
- [ ] no brew "ruby" line
- [ ] brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile --all parses

**Verify:** grep -nE '\"(go|node|ruby)\"' Brewfile shows go+node only; comm -13 of upstream vs fork has no go/node; brew bundle list --all parses.

**Steps:** 1) insert brew "go" (gnupg->graphviz); 2) insert brew "node" (nmap->ocrmypdf); 3) run Verify; 4) commit `build(brewfile): add go and node (IT-8323)`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Brewfile"], "verifyCommand": "grep -nE '\"(go|node|ruby)\"' Brewfile; comm -13 <(git show 93b9788:Brewfile | sort) <(sort Brewfile) | grep -E '\"(go|node)\"' && echo FAIL || echo OK; brew bundle list --file=./Brewfile --all >/dev/null && echo PARSES", "acceptanceCriteria": ["brew go between gnupg and graphviz", "brew node between nmap and ocrmypdf", "both byte-identical to upstream", "no brew ruby", "brew bundle list --all parses"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Install go + node and run end-to-end byte-identity + smoke check
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install go and node and confirm the ported slice is correct — top language group byte-identical to upstream 93b9788, file parses, both binaries on PATH, best-effort interactive behavior.

**Files:** _(none — verification only)_

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] brew bundle install installs go + node without error
- [ ] argcomplete->1password span diffs clean against 93b9788 and zsh -n passes
- [ ] command -v go and command -v node both resolve
- [ ] best-effort interactive check recorded (live-config caveat)

**Verify:** diff span vs 93b9788 && zsh -n && command -v go && command -v node -> OK

**Steps:** 1) brew bundle install; 2) re-run byte-identity diff + zsh -n; 3) go version / node --version + record interactive smoke (live ~/.config tracks hollow@main = 93b9788); 4) no commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "diff <(git show 93b9788:zsh/.zshrc | sed -n '/^zi auto with\"uv\" for argcomplete$/,/^zi auto has\"op\" wait1 for 1password-cli$/p') <(sed -n '/^zi auto with\"uv\" for argcomplete$/,/^zi auto has\"op\" wait1 for 1password-cli$/p' zsh/.zshrc) && zsh -n zsh/.zshrc && command -v go >/dev/null && command -v node >/dev/null && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["brew bundle install installs go + node", "byte-identity diff clean + zsh -n passes", "go and node on PATH", "best-effort interactive smoke recorded"]}
```
